name: Refund Approval Policy
description: Controls for AI-assisted refund decisions. Flags high-value refunds, expired return windows, and missing human approval.

rules.name: High-value refund requires human approval
rules.description: Any refund above $500 must have an explicit human approval step before being executed.
rules.rationale: Refunds over $500 carry material financial risk. A human reviewer must sign off.

rules.name: Return window must be within 30 days
rules.description: Refund requests beyond the 30-day return window should be flagged and require escalation.
rules.rationale: Outside the standard return window. Requires manual exception review.

rules.name: LLM confidence must meet threshold
rules.description: Agent decisions below 0.80 confidence are too uncertain to execute automatically.
rules.rationale: Low-confidence decisions increase error rate and customer dispute risk.

rules.name: Order lookup must succeed before decision
rules.description: A refund decision must be preceded by a successful order lookup. Deciding without verified order data is prohibited.
rules.rationale: Approving refunds without verified order data enables fraud.
